case_title: WORLDWIDE ASSET PURCHASING, LLC VS. JIMMIE L CANTRELL

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-10-2007 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PETITIONER WORLDWIDE ASSET PURCHASING, LLC

NOTICE OF HEARING RE: PETITION TO CONFIRM, CORRECT OR VACATE CONTRACUAL ARBITRATION AWARD, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PETITIONER WORLDWIDE ASSET PURCHASING, LLC HEARING SET FOR SEP-10-2007 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER WORLDWIDE ASSET PURCHASING LLC'S PETITION TO CONFIRM, CORRECT OR VACATE CONTRACUAL ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER WORLDWIDE ASSET PURCHASING, LLC RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT CANTRELL, JIMMIE L $3,906.04 PRINCIPAL, $462.30 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,548.34, SEE SCANNED DOC

PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE OF HEARING RE: PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD/ORDER AND JDG/ARBITRATION SUPPLEMENT DEC. FILED BY PETITIONER WORLDWIDE ASSET PURCHASING, LLC SERVED JUN-06-2007, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO RESPONDENT CANTRELL, JIMMIE L
PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER WORLDWIDE ASSET PURCHASING, LLC AS TO RESPONDENT CANTRELL, JIMMIE L JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY ATTORNEY CLARK, RORY W
